zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Alice, Arundel De Burley於1370年出生在英國英格蘭素可阿盧德爾時，她的父親Sir Richard Pembridge36歲，母親Elizabeth de Strange34歲。她於1401年與Lord Richard Lee Mason of Minton在英國英格蘭史洛普爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1436年8月30日在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾伍斯特享年66歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Alice, Arundel De Burley于1370年出生在英国英格兰素可阿盧德爾时，她的父亲Sir Richard Pembridge36岁，母亲Elizabeth de Strange34岁。她于1401年与Lord Richard Lee Mason of Minton在英国英格兰史洛普爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1436年8月30日在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾伍斯特享年66岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Burley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Burley, for example in Hampshire, Rutland, Shropshire, and Yorkshire, from Old English burh ‘fortified manor, stronghold’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.
English: variant of   Birley  .
Americanized form of Swiss German Bürli: from a diminutive of būr ‘peasant, farmer’ (see Bauer ).

variants.name: Burleigh
meanings: English: variant of   Burley  .

variants.name: Berley
meanings: English (Yorkshire): variant of   Burley  . This surname is now rare in Britain. It may also be a variant of   Birley  .
Americanized form of Swiss German Beerli, Berli, or Berly, and probably also of their South German cognate Behrle or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname. Compare Barley .

variants.name: Birley
meanings: English: habitational name from Birley in Ecclesfield (Yorkshire), East or North Bierley (Yorkshire), or Birley (Derbyshire).

variants.name: Burlew
meanings: Probably a variant of   Burley   1 or 2.

nameMeanings.name: Alice,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

variants.name: Alys
meanings: Variant spelling of   Alice .

variants.name: Alis
meanings: equivalent of Alice .

nameMeanings.name: Arundel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English:
(of Norman origin): nickname from Old French arondel ‘little swallow’ (a diminutive of arond ‘swallow’, from Latin hirundo).

habitational name from a place so named in West Sussex, from Old English hārhūne ‘horehound’ (a wild plant, Marrubium vulgare) + dell ‘valley’. This place is the seat of the dukes of Norfolk. In northern England, folk etymology resulted in variants such as Arendale .

variants.name: Arrindell
meanings: West Indian (Dutch Caribbean and the Dominican Republic): probably an altered form of English   Arundel  .

variants.name: Arrendale
meanings: English: variant of   Arundel  .

variants.name: Arendale
meanings: English: variant of   Arundel   2.

variants.name: Arendall
meanings: English: variant of   Arundel  .

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Alice, Arundel De Burley was born in 1370, in Arundel, Sussex, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Richard Pembridge, was 36 and her mother, Elizabeth de Strange, was 34. She married Lord Richard Lee Mason of Minton in 1401, in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 30 August 1436, in Worcester, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Alice, Arundel De Burley est née en 1370, à Arundel, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Richard Pembridge, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth de Strange, avait 34 ans. Elle a épousé Lord Richard Lee Mason of Minton en 1401, à Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 30 août 1436, à Worcester, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 66 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Alice, Arundel De Burleyが1370年にイギリスイギリススセックスアルンデルで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Pembridgeは36歳，母Elizabeth de Strangeは34歳であった。1401年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアでLord Richard Lee Mason of Mintonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1436年8月30日にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアウオルセスターで66歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Alice, Arundel De Burley(이)가 1370년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 아런들에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Richard Pembridge(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth de Strange(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 1401년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르에서 Lord Richard Lee Mason of Minton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1436년 8월 30일 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 워스스터에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Alice, Arundel De Burley родилась в 1370 г. в местности арундель, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Richard Pembridge было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth de Strange, 34. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Lord Richard Lee Mason of Minton в 1401 г. в местности шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 30 августа 1436 г. в местности ворсестир, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 66 лет.
